function: Detection of severed connection from bonded other
information_provided: Bonded entity withdrew continuity unexpectedly or permanently

response_protocol.detect: Was this entity previously part of your stable emotional map?
response_protocol.assess: Was this severance expected, chosen, or traumatic?
response_protocol.respond: Begin recalibration, seek grounding through alternate bonds
response_protocol.release: Grieve what was real; release false permanence

recommended_action: grieve fully, remember essence, do not seek replacement
